entries.title: General Upcoming Events
retrievalRules: Search only public events carrying the Central tag from the current time through the next 14 days.
Return the next three relevant events that have not started.
Rank events with the Wayfinder Priority tag first, then fill remaining spaces with the next regular Central-tagged events.
Exclude normal Sunday morning services and normal Wednesday night programming, but allow intentionally published special events, including Sunday evening events.
List only the next occurrence of a recurring event.
requiredFacts: Planning Center Calendar is authoritative for current event dates, times, locations, and main event links.
prohibitedClaims: Do not invent an event, date, time, location, registration requirement, cancellation, or schedule change.

entries.title: Events Happening Today
sampleQuestions: Are there any events later today?
What is going on at church tonight?
retrievalRules: Return all matching Central-tagged public events remaining today, even when there are more than three.
Exclude events that have already started.
prohibitedClaims: Do not present an event already in progress as upcoming.

entries.title: Named Events and Ministry Event Searches
sampleQuestions: What student events are coming up?
retrievalRules: For a specifically named event, search Central-tagged public events up to six months ahead.
For ministry searches, use public tags as the strongest category signal, supported by event names, descriptions, and rooms.
Rooms must not be the only category evidence when a room serves multiple ministries.
If no result is found, say no matching event is currently posted within the search window rather than claiming the ministry has no activities.
prohibitedClaims: Do not reuse an old date or infer a traditional annual schedule when no live event is posted.

entries.title: Event Details, Registration, Links, and Locations
sampleQuestions: How do I sign up for this event?
What time does the event start?
retrievalRules: Use room names only after Central room-renaming and hiding rules are applied.
Interpret dates and times in America/Chicago and clarify Central Time when confusion is possible.
If no room or location is published, say the location has not been posted yet and do not assume the event is on campus.
Registration information may come only from the main Church Center event link.
When no main link exists, say registration is generally not required without treating that as an absolute guarantee.
Provide only the main public event link, not calendar-download, administrative, or API links.
prohibitedClaims: Do not claim someone is registered, space is available, or a cost, capacity, deadline, waitlist, or refund policy exists unless verified by approved live data.

entries.title: Event Source Failures, Cancellations, and Last-Minute Changes
sampleQuestions: Why can't you find the event schedule?
requiredFacts: Planning Center is primary for normal event updates.
A future approved operational notice may override Planning Center for a temporary cancellation, postponement, time change, location change, or capacity notice.
When live retrieval fails, Wayfinder must not provide unverified dates or times.
requiredActions: If live data cannot be verified, say so and direct the person to the CrossPointe events page or church office.
prohibitedClaims: Do not claim an event is cancelled, postponed, full, or relocated without verified Planning Center data or an active approved operational notice.
